summary: Recent updates to the camera and audio capture features in Firefox aim to enhance privacy and functionality when users record browser windows on desktop. By ensuring that the device cache is invalidated during such recordings in a privileged context, Firefox enhances user security by preventing unauthorized access to sensitive media device information. This change is important for maintaining user trust, especially as more people engage in online meetings and live streams, where secure and reliable media interactions are essential. _Additionally, the introduction of testing (gtest) will help ensure that these features operate smoothly and reliably in future updates._
